---
title: "Case Study: Variant nowcasting"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This page is under development.
Content will be drawn from the companion paper
(Section 6: How-to case studies).
:::

**Lead:** Kaitlyn Johnson

SARS-CoV-2 variant [nowcasting](../resources/glossary.qmd#nowcasting) example

## Setting

## The challenge

## Approach

## Implementation

## Validation

## Results and lessons
